logic_delta.intent: F1 Genesis — Bootstrap the FMCF hash registry for Sentinel-Auth MVP. Define grammar shards (TypeScript 5.x, Effect 3.x), root topology (local.map.json), impact atlas (.atlas.graph), and all shard stubs (domain, auth, api, db). No src/ code written — Track 2 only.

F2 — TLI injection for packages/domain schema shard. Implemented UserSchema, LoginPayload, AuthResponse, three branded types (UserId, HashedPassword, JwtToken), and six tagged errors. Scaffolded pnpm monorepo (package.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, tsconfig.base.json, .nvmrc). tsc --noEmit: 0 errors. Registry updated to Active fidelity.

F3 — TLI injection for packages/auth shard. Implemented UserRepo (Context.Tag, DB interface), CryptoService (Argon2id), TokenService (JWT HS256), AuthService (signUp + login Effect.gen pipes), and barrel index.ts. All services use explicit typed locals to satisfy exactOptionalPropertyTypes. tsc --noEmit: 0 errors.

F4 — TLI injection for packages/db and packages/api. DB: UserRepoLive (parameterized SQL, PG unique-violation → DuplicateEmailError), PgLive (Config env vars + Redacted password), DbLive. API: AppRouter (POST /auth/signup 201, POST /auth/login 200, HttpBodyError → orDie defect), server.ts (full Layer composition: DbLive → AuthServiceWithInternalsLayer → AppRouter → NodeHttpServer). Effect ecosystem version matrix pinned: effect@3.19, @effect/platform@0.94, @effect/sql@0.49. tsc --noEmit: 0 errors on both packages.

F5 — TLI injection for packages/client shard. Scaffolded React 18 + Vite 6 SPA: domain.ts (type-only AuthResponse re-export), api.ts (fetch-based signUp/login, ApiError type), store.ts (useAuthStore discriminated union), AuthForm.tsx (controlled form, client-side validation, error mapping), Dashboard.tsx (authenticated user view), App.tsx (idle/authenticated routing), main.tsx (entry point). Premium dark-mode glassmorphism CSS design system. tsconfig.json baseUrl conflict resolved (composite/rootDir overrides). tsc --noEmit: 0 errors.

F6 — TLI injection for packages/infra shard. Created docker-compose.yml (postgres:16-alpine, pg_isready healthcheck, initdb.d auto-migration), migrations/001_init.sql (users table: UUID PK via gen_random_uuid(), email UNIQUE, password_hash TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, unique index), migrate.sh (psql runner, lexicographic order, set -euo pipefail), .env.example (PGHOST/PORT/DB/USER/PASSWORD, PORT, JWT_SECRET). TokenService already reads JWT_SECRET from process.env with dev fallback. Full stack is now runnable: docker compose up -d && pnpm run dev.

F7 — Forensic Audit remediation. CLOSED: (1) Linguistic Drift — created sql.hash.md (PostgreSQL 16) and bash.hash.md (Bash 5.x) grammar shards; (2) .atlas.graph missing infra→user-repo edge + grammar_refs block added; (3) Silo blur — infra.hash.md and infra/.logic.md now carry dual Persona_Track2/@DNA Engineer attribution; (4) local.map.json grammar_refs expanded to 4 shards; (5) atlas state_anchor advanced 0x6→0x7. GIT_REF remains UNLINKED per user directive (avoid commits). Token Efficiency: 72→90%.
